name: SONIDA SENIOR LIVING, INC.
summary: in this Annual Report on Form 10-K, on March 11, 2026, Sonida Senior Living, Inc. completed its previously announced acquisition of CNL Healthcare Properties, Inc. (CHP) through a series of steps ending with a forward merger of CHP with and into a subsidiary of Sonida Senior Living, Inc. (the CHP Merger), with such subsidiary surviving the Merger, as a result of which Sonida Senior Living, Inc. now indirectly owns all of the assets of CHP. Unless otherwise specifically noted or the context other...
